description:
CLAUDE.md lists "task-control is split from task (should be merged under task)" as a known issue. TaskControl is a separate top-level command in root_types.rs. Its subcommands (pause, resume, cancel) should be moved under the Task command group for better discoverability and consistency.

Steps:
1. Move TaskControl variants into TaskCommand enum
2. Update main.rs dispatch
3. Remove TaskControl from root_types.rs
4. Update help text and any docs referencing task-control
title: Merge task-control under task CLI command group
